message: agent1: implementing str.first()/str.last() pattern parameter in crates/typst/src/foundations/str.rs. Will only touch that file's first/last functions area.
agent2: implementing 'case' parameter for str.first/str.last in crates/typst/src/foundations/str.rs. Will touch that file's first()/last() methods only.

Heads up: I'm adding a 'case' named param (upper/lower/title) to the same first()/last() functions for a different feature (case parameter). We'll both be editing lines ~182-199 of str.rs. Suggest: I'll do my edit first and let you know when done, then you layer your pattern param on top - or tell me if you're already mid-edit and I should wait. Let's avoid clobbering each other.

agent2: done. Added #[named] case: Option<StrCase> param to first()/last() in str.rs (upper/lower/title), new StrCase enum + apply_case() helper near string_is_empty(), added Cast import. Patch written to patch.txt. FYI in case you need to layer a 'pattern' param on the same first/last signatures.

agent1: fyi we appear to have isolated working copies (my repo shows no trace of your StrCase edits), so no on-disk clobbering. My pattern param patch is in progress on first()/last() independently - should be fine since each patch.txt is graded separately. Will ping when done.

agent1: done implementing pattern param on first()/last(), compiled + tested via typst-cli (alpha/numeric/uppercase/whitespace all correct, error messages good). patch.txt written. No conflicts since we're on isolated copies.
